description_long: This bakery is housed in a simple, rectangular, single-story building with a flat roof and light gray exterior walls. The front facade features a double glass door flanked by two sets of rectangular windows, and above the entrance is a blank, pale signboard. The side walls have additional rows of rectangular windows, providing natural light to the interior. The rear of the building is plain, with a single door and no windows, while the opposite side wall mirrors the window arrangement of the first. The structure is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, and the overall appearance is clean and modern. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with metal and glass elements for the doors and windows.
description: A modern, rectangular bakery building with a flat roof, light gray walls, and large glass windows and doors on the front and sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows a double glass door entrance, two sets of rectangular windows, and a blank signboard above the door.
description_view_1: This side view displays a row of evenly spaced rectangular windows along the wall, with no doors or signage.
description_view_2: The rear view is plain, featuring a single door in the center and no windows or signage.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the first side, with a row of rectangular windows and no doors or signage.
attribute_storefront_signage: A blank, rectangular signboard is present above the main entrance. It is pale in color, with no visible text, logos, or patterns. The signboard is flush with the wall and appears to be made of a solid, matte material.
attribute_architectural_style: The building exhibits a utilitarian, modern style with clean lines, a flat roof, and minimal ornamentation. The use of large rectangular windows and a simple facade are its most prominent features.
